mapper.select: select id, enum_code, enum_name, enum_desc, category_code, category_name, is_enabled, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sys_enum_define where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'
mapper.update:
update sys_enum_define
enum_code = #{enumCode},
enum_name = #{enumName},
enum_desc = #{enumDesc},
category_code = #{categoryCode},
category_name = #{categoryName},
is_enabled = #{isEnabled},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
create_by = #{createBy},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_time = #{updateTime},
remark = #{remark},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update sys_enum_define set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id = #{id}

update sys_enum_define set is_deleted = '1',update_by=#{username}, update_time = now(),remark = CONCAT(remark, '|', #{username}, '删除', NOW()) where id in
#{id}

update.foreach:
update sys_enum_define
enum_code = #{item.enumCode},
enum_name = #{item.enumName},
enum_desc = #{item.enumDesc},
category_code = #{item.categoryCode},
category_name = #{item.categoryName},
is_enabled = #{item.isEnabled},
sort_order = #{item.sortOrder},
create_by = #{item.createBy},
create_time = #{item.createTime},
update_by = #{item.updateBy},
update_time = #{item.updateTime},
remark = #{item.remark},
where id = #{item.id}
